mapper.select:
select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks s where s.is_active = true and s.finnhub_symbol is not null order by exists ( select 1 from portfolio_items pi where pi.stock_id = s.id and pi.is_active = true ) desc, ( select max(sps.snapshot_date) from stock_price_snapshots sps where sps.stock_id = s.id ) asc nulls first, s.id asc
limit #{limit}
select distinct stock_id from portfolio_items where is_active = true

select stock_id, snapshot_date, current_price, change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d, market_cap, per_value, source from stock_price_snapshots where stock_id = #{stockId} order by snapshot_date desc, id desc limit 1

select current_price from stock_price_snapshots where stock_id = #{stockId} and snapshot_date < #{snapshotDate} and current_price is not null and current_price > 0 order by snapshot_date desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into stock_price_snapshots ( stock_id, snapshot_date, current_price, change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d, market_cap, per_value, source ) values ( #{stockId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{currentPrice}, #{changeRate1d}, #{changeRate7d}, #{changeRate30d}, #{marketCap}, #{perValue}, #{source} ) on conflict (stock_id, snapshot_date) do update set current_price = excluded.current_price, change_rate_1d = excluded.change_rate_1d, change_rate_7d = excluded.change_rate_7d, change_rate_30d = excluded.change_rate_30d, market_cap = excluded.market_cap, per_value = excluded.per_value, source = excluded.source
